title: IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Project Technician Posts
description: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Project Technician Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc can use this chance and apply for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 . Here we mentioned more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
